 * llms.txt — AI assistant discovery file
 *
 * This file follows the llms.txt specification (https://llmstxt.org) so that
 * AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, etc.) can understand
 * who Snehashish is and navigate the portfolio programmatically.
 *
 * Served at: https://snehashish.is-a.dev/llms.txt
 * Place this file in /public so Next.js serves it as a static asset.
 */

# Snehashish Mishra — Web Developer Portfolio

> A portfolio and technical blog by Snehashish Mishra — a passionate full-stack
> web developer specialising in Next.js, React, TypeScript, and the MERN stack.
> Currently pursuing MCA at SRM University.

## About

Snehashish Mishra is a web developer and software engineering student who builds
scalable, performant, and beautifully designed web applications. He writes
in-depth technical blog posts covering Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js,
DevOps with GitHub Actions, web performance optimisation, and more.

## Pages

- [Portfolio Home](https://snehashish.is-a.dev): One-page portfolio with
  sections for About, Skills, Projects, Experience, and Contact.
- [Blogs](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs): Technical blog listing page with
  all published articles.

## Blog Posts

- [Next.js App Router — A Deep Dive](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/introduction-to-nextjs)
- [Building an MDX Blog with Next.js & the Filesystem](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/nextjs-mdx-blog-with-fs)
- [Understanding the Node.js Event Loop](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/nodejs-event-loop)
- [GitHub Actions CI/CD](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/github-actions-cicd)
- [Understanding React Hooks](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/understanding-react-hooks)
- [TypeScript for Beginners](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/typescript-for-beginners)
- [REST APIs Explained](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/rest-apis-explained)
- [Web Performance Optimization](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/web-performance-optimization)
- [Git and GitHub Essentials](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/git-and-github-essentials)
- [Prettier Setup Guide (Latest Tailwind Plugin)](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/prettier-setup-guide-for_latest_tailwind_plugin_version)
- [Prettier Setup Guide (Legacy Version)](https://snehashish.is-a.dev/blogs/prettier-setup-guide-legacy-version)

## Skills & Technologies

Next.js, React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS,
Framer Motion, Git, GitHub Actions, REST APIs, Cloud Computing, UI/UX Design.
